name: CSI-Bench
summary: Large-scale in-the-wild benchmark spanning seven WiFi sensing tasks, commercial edge hardware, real homes, and continuous natural activity.

hardware.platform: Commercial routers and IoT edge devices

settings.scenario: Homes, offices, and public indoor areas; in the wild
